CustomField.label: Pass/Fail Formula
CustomField.description: Salesforce formula syntax for Record formula checks only - return true (pass) or false (fail), e.g. NOT(ISBLANK(BillingCity)). For Single query list checks ("List includes any of" / "List excludes all of"), use Value To Test (List Checks) instead. Not used for any other Check Method.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Record formula checks: return true/false (e.g. NOT(ISBLANK(BillingCity))). For list checks ("List includes any of"/"List excludes all of"), use Value To Test (List Checks) instead.
